The Signature Collection
Westminster-Branson
12 Hearthstone Crest, North York
I
The Narrative
A Legacy of
Refinement

Nestled in an exclusive enclave, 12 Hearthstone Crescent is a masterclass in modern luxury and architectural precision. This 5,300 sq. ft. custom-built residence offers a seamless blend of grand-scale entertaining spaces and intimate family comfort.

From the moment you step through the soaring foyer, the home commands attention with its high ceilings, designer millwork, and premium white marble flooring that reflects the abundance of natural light.

The Heart of the Home — The chef-inspired kitchen serves as the property's centerpiece, featuring Professional-Grade Appliances including a Bosch range and integrated Sub-Zero refrigeration, pristine white cabinetry paired with waterfall quartz countertops, and vibrant seating with crystalline pendant lighting.

Elevated Living — Beyond the kitchen, the open-concept layout flows into expansive living areas, offering serene views. The upper levels house sanctuary-like suites, with a primary retreat that rivals five-star spas.
